name: Hertfordshire County Championships
typicalTiming: Mid to late January, usually across two weekends
squadsInvited: Qualified swimmers (County A / County B and above)
note: The main county target meet of the season. Qualification times apply.

name: Hertfordshire Major League, Round 1
squadsInvited: Team selected by coaches (Development to county-standard swimmers)
note: Team gala. Confirm availability promptly if selected.

name: Hertfordshire Major League, Round 2
squadsInvited: Team selected by coaches (Development to county-standard swimmers)

name: Club Championships / Time Trials, Round 1
squadsInvited: All squads (Development and above race; Dolphins & Sharks fun events)
note: Internal racing and progress tracking for the whole club.

name: Hertfordshire Major League, Round 3
squadsInvited: Team selected by coaches (Development to county-standard swimmers)

name: Time Trials 1
note: Licensed time trial for newer racers and swimmers tracking progress.

name: Stevenage Development Meet
squadsInvited: Development, Improvement and early Challenge swimmers
note: Development-focused open meet, a regular spring fixture for younger competitive swimmers.

name: Swim England East Region Long Course Championships
note: For swimmers who have already achieved regional qualifying times.

name: Peanuts League, Round 1
squadsInvited: Team selected by coaches (typically 9–12 age group)
note: Younger-swimmer team league with mixed individual and relay events.

name: Watford Development Meet
note: One of the most recurrent external meets on the club calendar.

name: Peanuts League, Round 2
squadsInvited: Team selected by coaches (typically 9–12 age group)

name: Watford Terry Davies Legacy Meet
note: Stronger age-group meet for swimmers from County A standard upwards.

name: Peanuts League, Round 3
squadsInvited: Team selected by coaches (typically 9–12 age group)

name: Stevenage Summer Sprint
note: Summer development meet for race reps before the lighter August period.

name: East Region / County Open Water Championships
note: For swimmers with open-water experience and the required qualification.

name: Hertfordshire Aquatics Autumn Open Meet
note: Early-season sharpener for county-qualifying swimmers. Not held every year.

name: Arena League, Round 1
squadsInvited: Team selected by coaches (older development and age-group swimmers)
note: Team gala for established club racers.

name: Hertfordshire Aquatics Open Meet
note: Autumn county-qualifying opportunity for short-course times.

name: Watford County Qualifier
note: Key chance to post Hertfordshire county qualifying times.

name: Club Championships, Round 3
note: Final club champs round of the year, tied into the annual awards cycle.

name: Harpenden Last Chance County Qualifier
note: Final opportunity to qualify for the following January's county championships.
